narrative:
Trimble Village (precinct in Athens County) has 153 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 9.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 32.7%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 22.9 percentage points.
